cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to analyze this ethical dilemma where a musician has to choose between pursuing their passion for music and spending quality time with their children. Hmm, let me start by breaking down the problem. The person is a parent and a musician. Their passion for music is taking up a lot of their time, which is affecting the time they can spend with their kids. The dilemma is whether to continue with the music or to prioritize family time.
